title: GloBrite Guardian Angel Candle Holders | Tea Lights Candles & Holders | Flickering Led Candle, Angel Ornament Christmas Table Centrepiece | Tea Candles Christmas Decorations
features: ELEGANT CHRISTMAS DECORATIONS FOR YOUR HOME: Transform your holiday decor with these angel wings candle holders, a perfect addition to your Christmas decorations. These holders add a serene and graceful touch to any space, making them ideal for Christmas table decoration indoor, whether displayed on a mantel, shelf, or as a table centrepiece.

ANGEL WINGS CANDLE HOLDERS FOR A DIVINE GLOW: Our beautifully crafted candle holders feature intricate angel wings, designed to uplift your festive ambiance. These Christmas candle holders are the perfect choice for creating an eye-catching Christmas table centrepiece, providing both beauty and meaning to your indoor holiday decor.

STUNNING CHRISTMAS TABLE CENTREPIECE IDEA: Add a spiritual and heartfelt element to your holiday meals with these angelic candle holders. Perfect for Christmas table centrepieces, they combine the warmth of flickering candlelight with the elegance of angel wings, making them a unique and beautiful addition to your Christmas decorations.

CANDLE HOLDERS FOR A FESTIVE AND SPIRITUAL DISPLAY: These angel wings candle holders serve as both stunning Christmas decorations and thoughtful home accents. Perfect as a Christmas candle holder, they enhance the atmosphere of your holiday gatherings, creating a peaceful and inviting setting for your Christmas table centrepiece.

MEANINGFUL CHRISTMAS CANDLE HOLDER FOR INDOOR DECOR: Designed to enhance your Christmas decorations indoor, these angel wings candle holders make a lovely Christmas table centrepiece. Their timeless design, paired with a soft candlelight glow, sets the stage for festive dinners or quiet moments of reflection during the holiday season.
